description_long: This apartment building is a modern, mid-rise structure with a predominantly white facade accented by blue vertical columns on the corners and gray balcony railings. The front features a prominent entrance canopy and a series of stacked balconies, each with glass or light-colored railings, providing outdoor space for residents. The building has a symmetrical design, with two main vertical sections separated by a central column of windows and balconies. The sides are lined with evenly spaced windows, while the rear is mostly solid with minimal fenestration, suggesting utility or service areas. The roof is flat, with visible mechanical structures and stairwell enclosures. The overall appearance is clean, geometric, and functional, typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, mid-rise apartment building with a white facade, blue accents, and stacked balconies, featuring a flat roof and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance canopy, stacked balconies, and blue corner columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of balconies and windows, with blue accents on both ends.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to the front, showing the vertical window columns and blue accents.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a mostly solid white wall with minimal windows and no balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with regular, symmetrical spacing across the facade and sides, grouped between blue accent columns and aligned with the balconies.
